# Source Notes

Write one Markdown note for each database query, paper, patent, or manual source.

Recommended note sections:

```text
# Source Note: <short source name>

Date:
Source URL:
Search query:
Downloaded file:
What was included:
What was excluded:
Known caveats:
Next action:
```

These notes are important because external data often contains duplicates,
unclear targets, broad antifungal phenotypes, or assay rows that should not be
treated as direct FKS inhibition.
